arguments.argument:
event_inherited()
//Enemy base statistics eName="Sigma" eLevel=19 maxLife=5600 life=maxLife atkPower=6 resType[0]=2 resType[1]=2 resType[5]=4 stunResist=50 affiliation=4 bIsBoss=true bNoBonus=true hitSound=global.snd_EnemyHitMM dieEffect=0 bossProgress=0 activateBoss=0 //-------------------- attackSequence=0 atkProg=0 fadeSeq=-1 greenFlash=make_color_rgb(150,255,150)
